Game.Name: Makeruna! Makendou 2 - Kimero! Youkai Souridaijin (Japan)
Game.plot: Makeruna! Makendou 2: Kimero Youkai Souri is an Action game, developed by Success and published by Datam Polystar,which was released in Japan in 1995.Cheat: Character selection (Story Mode)At the title screen press the Select button 8 times, and then start the Story mode. You can now choose your favorite character in the Story mode.Cheat: Character selection (Story Mode)At the title screen press in order the following buttons, and then start the Story mode.Cheat: Character selection (Story Mode)At the title screen press in order the following buttons. Now the character Makenpo will be available in the antagonistic game mode (versus).
